response.justification: While this candidate demonstrates strong full-stack engineering capability and some large-scale infrastructure exposure, they fall significantly short on critical minimum qualifications. The role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming experience; the resume shows only 6-12 months of C++ work. Additionally, there is no evidence of formal technical leadership or mentoring roles, and the background is primarily full-stack web development rather than infrastructure/platform specialization. The gaps on core requirements are too substantial to proceed.
strengths: Proven ability to build and ship large-scale products across multiple domains (direct mail, investment, GIS, real-time data)
Demonstrates distributed systems exposure through Dunnhumby's microservices infrastructure handling millions of requests/second
Strong software craftsmanship practices including TDD, CI/CD, and open-source design thinking evident in personal projects
concerns: Critical C++ experience gap: 8 years required minimum, only ~6-12 months demonstrated in resume
No evidence of formal technical leadership or mentoring role; all positions are individual contributor or full-stack engineer titles
Background is full-stack web development (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, Ember.js), not infrastructure/platform engineering specialization
